indicators.name: arched wooden ceiling
indicators.rationale: The curved ceiling may limit headroom and restrict movement.

indicators.name: wide open space
indicators.rationale: The wide open space provides ample room for yoga practice.

indicators.name: natural light from skylights
indicators.rationale: Natural light can create a calming atmosphere for yoga.

indicators.name: wooden floor
indicators.rationale: Wooden floors are generally smooth and suitable for yoga mats.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is moderately suitable for yoga. While the wide open space and natural light are positive factors, the curved ceiling may limit headroom and restrict movement. A score of 4 rather than 5 reflects these mixed conditions.
